query_text: Plan a 3-day trip for 2 people from Indianapolis to Huntsville from November 5th to November 7th, 2024, with a budget of $1,350. Accommodations should allow pets. Include dining options featuring Tuscan, Chinese, Italian, and Mexican cuisines, and prioritize attractions such as sights & landmarks and shopping.

properties.name: Central HSV Mid Century Modern Apartment
properties.title: Apartment in Huntsville

properties.description: Sugarbush Hill is a "State Of The Art" maple sugaring operation near the Town of Huntsville. We are the largest sugarhouse open to the public on a year round basis in the District of Muskoka. We offer 100% pure maple syrup and other delicious maple products produced right here from our own sugarbush. SUGARHOUSE TOURS and TASTINGS from May to October, please check tour times and hours on our website under "Contact" and "Tours Details". Reservations and payment is required for tours in advance as they fill up quickly. See our huge eco-friendly and highly efficient wood-fired evaporator, many displays of maple antiques and artifacts or stroll our maple forest. We would be pleased to take the time to explain the complete maple sugaring process from the past to the present day. A Canadian heritage at it's finest is waiting for you. For your premium MUSKOKA MAPLE EXPERIENCE come to Sugarbush Hill Maple Farm and see what all the fuss has been about for centuries.

properties.description:
Italian villa ... Italian restaurant run and operated by Italian people... This is no your typical pasta , pizza place ... All menu item are freshly made and prepared from scratch ... Pizza dough has not preservatives , the tomato sauce has a zero sodium conts , NO MSG, the pasta is hand roll daily, the desserts all made by the Italian mama in the kitchen  all is Italian style homemade !!!!!!!!!!!!!  This restaurant is like traveling overseas without leaving your zip code .... And the food has an accent!!!!

I am the owner Elisa de Baggis massimi I will respect  my food , my heritage my culture by providing what I know is true, authentic, fresh and it is Italian food !!!!

properties.description: GREAT FOOD - RELAXED LOCATION: Our menu features favorites like mozzarella sticks and lasagna as staples, but our great-grandmother Carmela Mazzara's eggplant rollatini is something everyone will love! Service and quality is our trademark at the Church Street Family and Mazzaras offers the fast, casual service with the high-quality food our customers have come to expect from us!
